text:
Kenya's Amos Serem produced a remarkable performance on Friday night, delivering an upset victory over Olympic and world champion Soufiane El Bakkali in the 3000m steeplechase at the Diamond League Final in Brussels, Belgium.The 22-year-old former World Under-20 champion, who had finished a distant 14th at the Paris Olympics, led from start to finish in an impressive display of strength and strategy.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUncover the stories others won’t tell. title: Diamond League: Serem stuns Olympic champion El Bakkali to win 3000m Steeplechase
author: Washington Onyango
description: Serem clocked 8:06.90, stunning El Bakkali, whose homestretch surge has been his trademark.
